task: T20: Join requests + invitation approval API

join_requests.POST /api/channels/{id}/join-request: Create join request (auth, validates not member, no duplicate pending, WS notify)
join_requests.GET /api/requests: List pending requests for channels where user is owner/admin
join_requests.PUT /api/requests/{id}/approve: Approve (owner/admin only, adds member on approve)

invitations.POST /api/channels/{id}/invitations: Create invitation (owner only, validates user exists, not member, no duplicate)
invitations.GET /api/invitations: List pending invitations for current user

guards.already_member: Conflict on create_join_request / create_invitation if already member
guards.duplicate_pending: Conflict if pending request/invitation already exists
guards.non_owner_approve: Forbidden if not owner/admin for requests, not owner for invitations
guards.wrong_user_accept: Forbidden if not the invitation target for accept/reject
guards.already_processed: Conflict if re-approving/rejecting an already processed request
guards.nonexistent_user: NotFound when inviting a non-existent user

test_results: 140 passed (31 new for requests + invitations, existing tests unaffected)
